_comment: Single source of truth for Apple M-series chips. To add a new chip generation, append an entry below and run `make` (the C++ header chip_table.h is regenerated automatically). Python code reads this file at import time via agent_steel/chips.py. Order: newest -> oldest so detect_generation() matches the most-specific generation first.

_schema.gen: lowercase tag, e.g. m6 — used as the canonical chip_id
_schema.brand: uppercase brand fragment as it appears in sysctl machdep.cpu.brand_string, e.g. M6
_schema.variants: ordered list of suffixes from most-specific to least; '' is the bare model
